picks.quote: I will be picking, as you can guess, Belal Muhammad at 37 years old against the up-and-coming hungry 28-year-old. I'm going to pick him to win the fight.
I think I have to lean to Brendan Allen overall just cuz of all the advantages he does have outside of knockout power. So, yeah... yes, I'll pick Brendan Allen, whatever
I might bet on Edmen Shahbazyan here. And Edmen Shahbazyan is the moneyline side in my opinion. He's the value side in my opinion. He's the betting pick in my opinion.
I expect Fares Ziam to be one step above Tom Nolan... So, I'm picking Fares Ziam here. I'm picking him to win this fight via decision.
So, I'm taking Iwo Baranowski to win this fight. I'm taking him via KO and I'm taking him via KO ground and pound in round [one]
I'm going to pick John Lineker in this fight as a plus 400 underdog... He's the money line side for me easily.
I am going to ultimately end up on the side of Edgar Chairez here... So, I'll pick Edgar Chairez in this fight. I'll pick him to win the fight via submission.
I got to pick Chelsea here. The reason I got to pick Chelsea is cuz I think she can hurt Priscilla on the feet just like Priscilla can hurt her. But also, she has grappling upside
I have to pick Breo in this one... So, I'm going to pick Joanderson Breo here... my official prediction will be Joanderson Breo via knockout.
I definitely got Chavez to win the fight. She's just better everywhere, you know... Jessica Chavez via knockout is my official prediction.
I got Ketlen Souza to win this fight. I got her to get revenge over Ariane and I'll say it's via decision.
